description: Constructed to expose enum_repair's homogeneous-within-requirement limitation. 2 lamps + 2 sensors, single ecosystem, no hubs needed. Budget 4000 makes 2x premium-lamp infeasible (3600+at-least-600=4200) but 1xmid+1xpremium-lamp fits (2200+space). Expected: enum_repair best = 2M lamp + 2P sensor at Q=0.90; brute force best = 1M+1P lamp + 2P sensor at Q=0.925. Same H=0, E=1 - brute force solution strictly dominates enum_repair's best on quality.
